<!-- Meeting on 2025_03_10 -->

```{r meet-20250310-getwd, eval=F}
 getwd()
```


# Meeting Notes - 2025/03/10

## Guidelines for the Development of Omic Based Products {-}

* Following several cases of flawed products making it into
the clinic,  the National Cancer Institute (NCI) requested 
that the Institute of Medicine (IOM) committee to 
*develop recommendations to clarify and improve the pathway 
from discovery to first use of omics-based tests in a clinical trials*.


* White paper - [Evolution of Translational Omics: Lessons Learned and the Path Forward](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/24872966/)

* [Summary slides](OmicsTests_files/_OmicsTests.html)

* The money slide



```{r meet-20250310-caption, eval=T}
CAPTION <-  paste(
  readLines("OmicsTests_files/Omics-based_Test_Development_Process_caption.txt", warn=F),
   collapse='  ')
```

```{r meet-20250310-money-slide,  fig.cap=CAPTION, echo=F}

   knitr::include_graphics("OmicsTests_files/Omics-based_Test_Development_Process.png", dpi=75)

```




<br/>

## Figures with comments {-}

* [Wei Figures](Wei_figs/Wei_figs.html)

<br/>

## Further Comments {-}


<br/>

## Knowledge Base {- .tabset}

### Home {-}

<br/>

### AI in Tx Omics  {-}

* Literature search: When do classifiers based on novel methods
do better than traditional methods. 

<br/>

### Biomarkers of Skin Cancer {-}


<br/>

### Classifiers based on micRNA {-}

<br/>



```{r, eval=F}
setwd("..")
```

###########################################################
 ARCHIVED CODE BELOW
###########################################################


    
<!-- To run
# nohup Rscript -e "knitr::knit2html('_index.Rmd')" > _index.log  &
    
# Or 
# nohup Rscript -e "rmarkdown::render('_index.Rmd')" > _index.log  &
    
-->
